theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

verdicts.name: Hyperliquid
verdicts.note: Perp DEX 1위 + Prediction Markets 진입, 일매출 폭증
verdicts.label: HOLD

narrative.summary: Hyperliquid: 정량 종합 52점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 53 / 중기 62 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +8.5% 위치. T1 $42.08 (R:R 4.0), T2 $44.82 (R:R 6.6)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $37.76 아래 손절가 $36.69 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Tech Rally Stalls as Oil Rises on Iran Stalemate: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A retreat in high-flying technology stocks is dragging equities lower as traders wait for US inflation data. Brent rose for a third straight day, with the ceasefire in the Middle East appearing increasingly fragile.

top_news.title: Siemens Energy CFO Sees Data Center Demand Into Next Decade
top_news.summary: Siemens Energy is benefiting from surging artificial intelligence use that’s driving demand for power-hungry data centers, especially in the US. In an interview on Bloomberg Daybreak Europe, CFO Maria Ferraro said she sees demand going well "into the next decade." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Gilts Slump With UK’s Starmer Under Pressure to Stand Down
top_news.summary: UK government bonds fell as a growing number of Labour party politicians called on their leader Keir Starmer to step down following large losses in local elections last week.

top_news.title: Vodafone Sales Growth Beats as German Service Revenue Rises
top_news.summary: Vodafone Group Plc reported organic revenue growth last quarter that beat analysts’ expectations as the mobile operator focuses on its biggest markets and Germany returned to growth.

top_news.title: Yen Gains Abruptly Then Pulls Back During Bessent Visit to Japan
top_news.summary: The yen strengthened sharply versus the dollar on Tuesday before falling back during a visit by US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to Japan.

top_news.title: Amazon Kicks Off Debut Swiss Franc Bond Sale in Record Six Parts
top_news.summary: Amazon.com Inc. has begun the sale of its first Swiss franc bonds as it looks to raise a record six-part deal in the currency.

top_news.title: Ethiopian in Talks With Airbus for Widebody, Regional Jet Order
top_news.summary: Ethiopian Airlines Group is in early talks with Airbus SE to purchase regional and widebody aircraft as Africa’s largest carrier looks to expand its foothold on the continent and beyond.

top_news.title: Bristol-Myers Inks Up to $15 Billion Licensing Deal With Hengrui
top_news.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb Co. inked a collaboration and licensing deal with Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. that could be valued at as much as $15.2 billion, as the US drugmaker seeks to leverage China’s efficiency in early development.

top_news.title: DroneShield Plunges as Regulator Probes Filings, Share Trades
top_news.summary: DroneShield Ltd.’s stock tumbled to the lowest in about three months after the Australian counter-drone firm said the nation’s financial regulator was reviewing its disclosures and share trades from November.

top_news.title: ADNOC Gas: Ready to Export LNG As Soon As Hormuz Reopens
top_news.summary:
ADNOC Gas reported resilient 1Q earnings, with net income beating analyst estimates despite disruption to exports through the Strait of Hormuz. The company is also managing the impact of recent incidents at its Habshan facility, with plans to reach 80% capacity by the end of 2026. Peter van Driel, CFO of ADNOC Gas spoke to Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on the disruptions caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

 (Source: Bloomberg)
